name: Release Notes v3.13.8 - API Changes
body:
Release Notes v3.13.8 - API Changes

Release Date: 12th July 2021

In this release we've made several changes to the our APIs as part of our commitment to continuous evolution and improvement to Retail Express.

 

Inventory Planning API

MethodDetails
GetProductsAs previously advised, the deprecated "DisableProduct" field has now been removed
GetStockByOutletThe correct Global Price is now returned for a product when there is no Outlet-specific price configured

 

Webstore API

  • The Allocated quantity is now updated correctly when cancelling a sale through the Webstore API

Want more information? View all Release Notes or subscribe to updates.
